choices: Loads hexadecimal words from a file into a memory array
Synthesizes the DUT from hex source
items.explain: readmemh fills an array from hex text at elaboration or time zero.

items.prompt: In a typical apply loop, after driving stim[i] you should…
choices: Advance time, then compare DUT output to exp[i]
Recompile the testbench for each vector
items.explain: Inputs need time to settle before comparison against expected values.

items.prompt: Separating stimulus and expected vectors in files lets you swap test sets without recompiling the TB loop.
items.explain: The same apply loop replays different hex files.

items.prompt: An @addr directive in a hex file…
choices: Sets the next write index for subsequent data lines
Converts binary digits to hex automatically
items.explain: @addr skips to a specific array index before loading words.
readmemb loads binary; readmemh loads hex.
